recommendations.title: Black Is King
recommendations.overview: This visual album from Beyoncé reimagines the lessons of "The Lion King" (2019) for today's young kings and queens in search of their own crowns.
recommendations.director: Beyoncé, Blitz Bazawule, Emmanuel Adjei, Ibra Ake, Jake Nava, Jenn Nkiru, Dikayl Rimmasch, Pierre Debusschere

recommendations.title: HOMECOMING: A film by Beyoncé
recommendations.overview: This intimate, in-depth look at Beyoncé's celebrated 2018 Coachella performance reveals the emotional road from creative concept to cultural movement.

recommendations.title: HIStory on Film, Volume II
recommendations.overview: Nearly 2 hours of the short films that made HIStory... Including never before released short films.
recommendations.director: Spike Lee, James Yukich, Mark Romanek, Colin Chilvers, Vincent Paterson, Don Mischer, Wayne Isham, Nicholas Brandt, John Landis, Bob Giraldi

recommendations.title: Lords of Chaos
recommendations.overview: A teenager's quest to launch Norwegian Black Metal in Oslo in the 1990s results in a very violent outcome.

recommendations.title: Taylor Swift: The 1989 World Tour - Live
recommendations.overview: Filmed in front of 76,000 fans at the ANZ Stadium in Sydney, Australia, "The 1989 World Tour Live" captures Taylor Swift's entire performance while also mixing in behind-the-scene, rehearsal, and special guest footage from her 1989 Tour.

recommendations.title: Never Let Me Go
recommendations.overview: As children, Kathy, Ruth, and Tommy spend their childhood at an idyllic and secluded English boarding school. As they grow into adults, they must come to terms with the complexity and strength of their love for one another while also preparing for th

recommendations.title: One Hour Photo
recommendations.overview: Sy Parrish has lovingly developed photographs for the Yorkin family since their son was a baby. But as the Yorkins' lives become fuller, Sy's only seems lonelier, until he eventually convinces himself he's part of their family. When Sy's picture-perf

recommendations.title: Polar
recommendations.overview: When a retiring assassin realizes that he is the target of a hit, he winds up back in the game going head to head with a gang of younger, ruthless killers.

recommendations.title: 13th
recommendations.overview: An in-depth look at the prison system in the United States and how it reveals the nation's history of racial inequality.

recommendations.title: ariana grande: excuse me, i love you
recommendations.overview: Ariana Grande takes the stage in London for her Sweetener World Tour and shares a behind-the-scenes look at her life in rehearsal and on the road.
